name: DML - Medallia - Sales Exp Invite - SWR variation

content.query:
SELECT distinct
cst.FirstName as FIRST_NAME
,cst.LastName as LAST_NAME
,cst.Email as EMAIL_ADDRESS
,cst.Phone as PHONE_NUMBER
,lds.id as LEAD_ID
,prd.LongDescr as PRODUCT_LINE
,getdate() as DATE_TO_SURVEY
,'US' as COUNTRY
,'English' as LANGUAGE
,lds.cst_id as ACCOUNT_ID
,[slr_id] as SALES_REP_ID_1
,'SWR' as BRAND_NAME
,[slr_id2] as SALES_REP_ID_2
,brn.LongName as SALES_BRANCH_NAME
,org.Descr as SALES_ORGANIZATION
,app.Sold as SOLD
,app.[ApptDate] as APPOINTMENT_DATE
 FROM
 [ODS].[LP_SWR_app_Appointments] app
 ,[ODS].[LP_SWR_Lds_Leads] lds
 ,[ODS].[LP_SWR_cst_Customers] cst
 ,[ODS].[LP_SWR_prd_Products] prd
 ,[ODS].[LP_SWR_org_Organization] org
 ,[ODS].[LP_SWR_ous_OrgUnits] ous
 ,[ODS].[LP_SWR_brn_Branches] brn
 WHERE
app.id = lds.app_id
and lds.cst_id = cst.id
and lds.[productid] = prd.ProductID
and lds.brn_id = brn.id
and brn.id = ous.brn_id
and ous.org_id = org.id
and app.Sat = 1 
and app.ApptDate is not null
and datediff(DAY, app.ApptDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate()))  between 0 and 1
and org.Descr in ('GULF REGION', 'SOUTHWEST REGION')
and LEFT(lds.src_id, 2) <> 'HD'
